Live search: estate & house manager, private PA (US)

americas.title: Director of Residences · UHNW family
americas.blurb: Year-round operational oversight of a UHNW family's residences: standards, SOPs, inspections, readiness and staff training across the portfolio, with regular travel between properties. Starting salary around $300k plus full benefits.

americas.title: Houseman / Junior House Manager · Executive
americas.blurb: A high-profile executive in Clearwater seeks a hands-on houseman / junior house manager to keep the estate running: light indoor and outdoor upkeep, minor repairs, smart-home systems and vendor supervision. Two years' estate experience required. $120k plus full benefits.

americas.title: Estate Manager · Brentwood & beach residence
americas.blurb: A discreet UHNW family returning from Europe seeks a live-out Estate Manager to run their Brentwood primary home and a secondary beach property. Staff and vendor management, event coordination and strong home-automation skills. Six-day week; competitive salary plus benefits.

americas.title: House Manager · Two residences
americas.blurb: A newly created role supporting two primary residences roughly an hour apart: a ~6,000 sq ft main home in St. James and a ~5,000 sq ft summer residence in East Quogue. Flexible, trustworthy candidate comfortable setting up new routines. No childcare required.

americas.title: Estate Manager · Three properties
americas.blurb: Manage three properties for a Venice-based family (Venice, San Francisco and Ojai), spearheading a multi-year San Francisco renovation. Suited to a logical thinker and strong problem-solver with proven multi-property experience and long tenures.

americas.title: Estate Manager · Malibu, Beverly Hills & Miami
americas.blurb: Oversee three modern luxury residences for a UHNW entrepreneur: a Western Malibu beachfront home plus properties in Beverly Hills and Miami (managed remotely). Autonomous, tech-savvy professional with 5–7 years of high-end estate experience. Competitive salary plus benefits.

americas.title: Estate Manager · UHNW household
americas.blurb: A UHNW household seeks a full-time Estate Manager to oversee operations across residences in Los Angeles, San Francisco and Ojai. Property, staff and vendor oversight to five-star standards, coordinating security and household systems across the portfolio.

europe.title: Personal Assistant to a renowned music artist
europe.blurb: A renowned artist travelling regularly internationally seeks an exceptional PA to join a small, dedicated team. Part-time consultancy agreement with significant flexibility expected in days and hours.

europe.title: Travelling Personal Assistant / Butler
europe.blurb: A well-travelled principal with homes across Europe, the UAE and the UK seeks a travelling PA / Butler to become a long-term member of the household team. Diary and travel coordination, residence preparation and meal service, with complete autonomy and discretion.

europe.title: Butler · Prestigious residence
europe.blurb: A prestigious Monaco residence seeks an experienced butler for a dedicated household team committed to the highest standards. Suited to a seasoned hospitality professional where discretion, precision and anticipation are essential day to day.

europe.title: Chief of Staff · UHNW household
europe.blurb: Strategic and operational right hand to the principals, integrating household staffing, estate management, family logistics and lifestyle support across all properties. Early focus on building the organisation: vendors, SOPs and recruiting without interrupting service levels.

mideast.title: International HR Manager · Family office group
mideast.blurb: Based in the Dubai office, manage HR operations across the group and the employment lifecycle of household staff placed with clients through EOR and payroll services. Spans the UAE, France, the UK and the US; rigorous with contracts and cross-border compliance.

mideast.title: Household Manager / Senior Housekeeper
mideast.blurb: A formal private household in Dubai seeks a discreet, highly organised Household Manager / Senior Housekeeper to oversee the smooth running of the home. A hands-on blend of household management, senior housekeeping and occasional childcare or pet support.

mideast.title: Butler / Household Manager · Emirati family
mideast.blurb: An Emirati family seeks a live-out Butler / Household Manager to run their private villa in Al Khawaneej, Dubai. Managing household operations, supervising a team of drivers, housemaids and security, and maintaining high standards of presentation and service.
